---
name: Feature Task
about: Define a new feature. Use change instead if the "what" is already decided. Use spike if the "what" is still unknown.
labels: [feature, spec-needed]
---

## Summary

<!-- What problem are we solving, and what is the proposed solution? -->

## Problem Statement

<!-- Describe the need in plain language. Who is affected and why does it matter? -->

## Scope

<!-- What is in scope for this issue? -->

## Out of Scope

<!-- What is explicitly not included? -->

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Test Strategy

<!-- How will correctness be verified? Include unit, integration, and regression expectations. -->

-

## Assumptions

<!-- What are you assuming is true? Unvalidated assumptions should be spiked first. -->

- 

## User Flows

<!-- Optional. Fill in if this is user-facing. If any of User Flows / Usability Requirements / Design Direction are filled, all three are required. -->

-

## Usability Requirements

<!-- Optional. Required if User Flows is filled. -->

-

## Design Direction

<!-- Optional. Required if User Flows is filled. Link to designs or describe direction. -->

-

## Security Requirements

<!-- Required when the issue carries security-scope -->

- 

## Threat Model

<!-- Required when the issue carries security-scope -->

- Trust boundaries:
- Main abuse paths:
- Required mitigations:

## Dependencies / Blockers

- 

## Links

<!-- Link the spec artifact (SPEC.md, wiki page, or architecture decision) that defines this feature.
     This is required before the issue can be marked ready-for-build. -->

- 

## Notes for Orchestrator

<!-- Why is this ready or not ready for build? -->
